overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic advertisements, and an underpass. The footage appears to be from a video game with cinematic quality and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with holographic ads

events.description: pedestrians cross the path from right to left in front of the camera
camera begins following a pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past neon advertisements and palm trees, following a pedestrian ahead

entered.detail: tall building facade with vertical yellow neon signage
large digital screens displaying red and pink holographic advertisements
tall palm trees lining the center of the street
tall poles with bright white lights illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy cyberpunk street at night, passing bright neon advertisements on the left and palm trees lining the sidewalk. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights as the camera follows a pedestrian ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway underpass with concrete infrastructure

events.description: entering the covered area under the concrete overpass, sky becomes obscured
passing a brightly lit blue neon shop front on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass past support pillars and orange traffic barriers

notable_agents.action: black car driving slowly under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead with support pillars
building corner with bright cyan blue neon lighting
orange and white striped concrete barriers lining the sidewalk
street sign displaying speed limit of 40

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered underpass with concrete pillars and overhead structure. A blue-lit shop glows intensely on the right as vehicles pass through the dimly lit tunnel, and traffic barriers line the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy commercial street with towering holographic displays

events.description: exiting the underpass back into the open foggy street with visible sky
passing close by a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella

agents.ego_description: continuing down the foggy street past neon signs and approaching a pedestrian with an illuminated umbrella

notable_agents.action: walking with a large umbrella featuring purple neon lights and red illuminated clothing

entered.detail: large digital advertisement screens displaying various colorful content
small structure with illuminated interface on the left sidewalk
tall illumination poles continuing along the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into the open foggy street lined with towering holographic advertisements on the left. The camera approaches and passes a pedestrian carrying a neon-lit umbrella before continuing down the misty sidewalk past street lights and vending machines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk street that dips into a concrete underpass before emerging back into a misty urban corridor. It begins by gliding along a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees and bright advertisements, following a pedestrian as colorful lights reflect off the pavement. As the camera moves forward, the open street transitions into a covered underpass where the atmosphere shifts to a dimly lit tunnel characterized by heavy concrete pillars and the intense blue glow of a roadside shop. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the tunnel back into the fog, passing towering holographic displays and a pedestrian with a neon-lit umbrella. Finally, the movement continues down the misty sidewalk, passing street lights and vending machines that fade into the hazy night.
